commands.review_summary:
The PR deletes the standalone channel-message-flows dev script, moves its Telegram flow evidence into Telegram-owned QA e2e test support, adds a QA Lab scenario, and updates the local skill instructions.

PR surface: Source -112, Tests -47, Docs -10, Other +27. Total -142 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a cleanup PR. Source inspection confirms current main still has the standalone script and PR head moves the evidence into a QA scenario.
commands.review_followup: - The maintainer-labeled PR should stay in normal maintainer review; no narrow automated repair is needed from this review.

target.title: test: fold channel message flows into qa e2e
target.body:
## Summary
- delete `scripts/dev/channel-message-flows.ts`
- fold Telegram channel flow parsing, preview clearing, and durable-final proof into the QA e2e test
- remove stale changed-test routing for the deleted script and update the local channel-message-flows skill to use QA/Vitest proof

Stacked on #93114.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/e2e/qa-lab/channels/channel-message-flows.e2e.test.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm openclaw qa suite --scenario channel-message-flows --output-dir .artifacts/qa-e2e/channel-message-flows-script-deleted`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 test/e2e/qa-lab/channels/channel-message-flows.e2e.test.ts scripts/test-projects.test-support.mjs test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --prompt "Review this stacked RFC #10 cleanup PR. It deletes scripts/dev/channel-message-flows.ts, folds the Telegram channel message flow parsing/preview/final-send proof into test/e2e/qa-lab/channels/channel-message-flows.e2e.test.ts, removes stale changed-test routing for the deleted script, and updates the tracked channel-message-flows skill to use QA scenario/Vitest proof instead of the deleted script. Focus on whether any supported command/docs/package/skill surface still references the deleted script, whether the e2e test remains proper Vitest without script execution, and whether QA scenario evidence still runs. Ignore .artifacts and node_modules."`

Known local warning during QA commands: existing state migration warning for `.openclaw/plugins/installs.json.migrated` already being present.
target.author: romneyda
